codeReview.summary: The feature is partially implemented, but two required behaviors were not verified as specified. Dispatch validation recorded HOOKED instead of in_progress, and `gt mayor attach scbench` was not successfully verified.

issues.description: Dispatch verification does not match expected behavior. The executed command used `gt sling ... --hook-raw-bead --no-convoy` and the recorded result is `status=hooked` (line 28), but the requirement is bead transition to `in_progress` (`features.json` expectedBehavior).

Required verification `gt mayor attach scbench succeeds` is not satisfied. The handoff explicitly states this command could not be verified in the non-interactive environment, while the feature requires successful attach verification.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Mission guidance requires commit/push after every feature, but this feature reports no repo changes and reuses an older commit ID. The process for external-state-only work is unclear.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Mission AGENTS.md lines 28-35 mandate commit/push per feature; handoff line 6 reports commitId `fbea027` (a prior feature commit), and the transcript ends with a clean repo and no new commit.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The infra-worker skill does not document how to handle interactive-only verification steps in non-interactive worker environments, which led to an unverified required step (`gt mayor attach scbench`).
sharedStateObservations.evidence: infra-worker SKILL.md procedure has generic verification guidance (lines 54-58) but no non-interactive fallback for attach-style commands; handoff line 99 records inability to verify attach.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Gas Town escalation config appears to require `smtp_port` as a string; this environment quirk is not captured in shared library docs.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Handoff lines 94-95 note a fix from integer `587` to string `"587"` to resolve JSON unmarshal errors, while `.factory/library/environment.md` does not mention this constraint.

summary: Review failed for `gastown-dispatch-comms`. Core dispatch and attach validations do not meet the feature contract as written, although mail/escalation/crew checks were exercised and escalation routing was adjusted.
